items.title_original: ByteDance unveils Seedance 2.5 in Beijing, saying the AI video model can generate 30-second clips from up to 50 reference materials, up from 12 for Seedance 2.0 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items.title_en: ByteDance unveils Seedance 2.5 in Beijing, saying the AI video model can generate 30-second clips from up to 50 reference materials, up from 12 for Seedance 2.0 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items.title_zh: 位元組跳動在北京推出 Seedance 2.5，稱人工智慧視訊模型可根據多達 50 個參考資料產生 30 秒的剪輯，而 Seedance 2.0 則為 12 個（Juro Osawa/The Information）

items.title: Google plans a 12-week incubator, picking 10 to 20 AI startups from its "Xoogler" alumni and providing up to $350K in cloud credits and $100K in direct funding (Guinevere Grant/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Google plans a 12-week incubator, picking 10 to 20 AI startups from its "Xoogler" alumni and providing up to $350K in cloud credits and $100K in direct funding (Guinevere Grant/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Google plans a 12-week incubator, picking 10 to 20 AI startups from its "Xoogler" alumni and providing up to $350K in cloud credits and $100K in direct funding (Guinevere Grant/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 谷歌計劃建立一個為期 12 週的孵化器，從「Xoogler」校友中挑選 10 到 20 家人工智慧新創公司，並提供高達 35 萬美元的雲端信貸和 10 萬美元的直接資金（Guinevere Grant/彭博）
items.title_bilingual: 谷歌計劃建立一個為期 12 週的孵化器，從「Xoogler」校友中挑選 10 到 20 家人工智慧新創公司，並提供高達 35 萬美元的雲端信貸和 10 萬美元的直接資金（Guinevere Grant/彭博） / Google plans a 12-week incubator, picking 10 to 20 AI startups from its "Xoogler" alumni and providing up to $350K in cloud credits and $100K in direct funding (Guinevere Grant/Bloomberg)

items.title: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社） / The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)

items.title_zh: 文件顯示：截至 5 月 31 日，甲骨文全球員工數量在過去 12 個月內減少了 21,000 人，至 141,000 人；該公司表示，人工智慧的採用已導致減少（布羅迪福特/彭博社）
